modelName: OC3 Ransomware SME Target - LLM Uplift with Uncertainty
modelDescription: A cybersyndicate level ransomware affiliate targets an SME with ransomware, gaining initial access by exploiting a vulnerability, moving to perform double extortion on the target.

nodes.name: Initial Access
nodes.description: The actor successfully uses an exploit against a known vulnerability in a public-facing application (e.g., VPN, SharePoint, Exchange) to gain an initial foothold on the target's network.

nodes.name: Execution
nodes.description: After gaining access, the actor executes commands and malicious payloads, often using legitimate scripting interpreters like PowerShell to blend in with administrative activity.

nodes.name: Privilege Escalation
nodes.description: The actor escalates from user-level access to administrative or domain-level privileges, often by exploiting unpatched internal vulnerabilities or dumping credentials.

nodes.name: Successful Attack Rate
nodes.expression: rec * res * ini * exe * pri * dis * lat * col * com * exf * imp

nodes.name: Lateral Movement
nodes.description: The actor moves from the initial point of compromise to other critical systems across the network, using stolen credentials with remote services like RDP or SMB shares.
